nodes.label: Regex path runs regardless of tree-sitter availability.
Signature/import preservation on the regex path across languages.
A language with no regex patterns yields an all-compressible         mask rather
Container bodies must stay compressible (signature-only spans).      Regression:
Parsers must be thread-local.          Regression: parsers were cached in a proc
Byte offsets must be converted to char offsets.          Regression: tree-sitter
A class with substantial method bodies should NOT preserve         everything —
